---
layout: cv
title: Ethan Jensen's CV
---
# Ethan Raymond Jensen
Computer Science Student | AI Engineering Minor

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:jen24008@byui.edu">jen24008@byui.edu</a>
| 208-803-2828
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ethan-jensen0804">LinkedIn</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/ejens0804/ejens0804">GitHub</a>
</div>


## Education

`September 2024 - April 2027`
__B.S. in Computer Science | Minor: AI Engineering__
*Brigham Young University - Idaho*, Rexburg, ID

- GPA: 4.00
- Currently completing coursework in C++ (expected Apr 2026)


## Skills

__Programming Languages:__ Python, C#, C++

__Web Development:__ HTML, CSS

__Software Engineering:__ Object-Oriented Programming, Data Structures & Algorithms

__Databases:__ MySQL, SQL

__Tools & Other:__ Networking, Data Analysis, QPR Institute Certified


## Academic Projects

`September 2024 - Present`
__GitHub Project Portfolio__
*Personal Portfolio & Academic Projects*, Rexburg, ID

- Published GitHub Portfolio — 6+ projects including web apps, databases, OOP systems, and applied programming work: [github.com/ejens0804](https://github.com/ejens0804/ejens0804)
- Built 3 websites, multiple MySQL databases, a Python database program, and several C# OOP projects, including an 18-class Bank Management System with a MySQL backend
- Building five applied programming projects leveraging Rust, C++, game frameworks, SQL relational databases, and networking to strengthen multi-paradigm software engineering skills

`October 2024`
__BYU-I Hackathon__
*Major League Hacking*, Rexburg, ID

- Collaborated with a team of 4 developers to create a web application to help college students organize schedules
- Learned how full-stack systems function by building a scheduling web app with a team of 4


## Experience

`September 2025 - December 2025`
__New Student Mentor__
*Brigham Young University - Idaho*, Rexburg, ID

- Mentored 40 incoming students, boosting first-semester retention and engagement through weekly check-ins, campus tours, and resource referrals
- Streamlined onboarding and communication with group messaging and personalized outreach, achieving 95% participation in class and on campus events

`March 2024 - July 2025`
__Amazon Delivery Associate__
*Boise Route Works & Inland XMile*, Meridian, ID

- Delivered 150+ packages per shift with 98%+ success rate, consistently meeting deadlines and safety standards

`August 2023 - March 2024`
__Electronics & Cables Manufacturer__
*Kimco Design & Manufacturing*, Meridian, ID

- Assembled 50+ electronic components per shift with 99% ROHS compliance, using technical diagrams to build cabling and equipment to IPC/WHMA-A-620 standards


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2026 -->
